name: extractor validator requires every emitted pattern record to carry a usefulness_estimate integer in the inclusive range one to five
command: printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4}]\n' > patterns.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-patterns.sh" --patterns patterns.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'all_valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
